# CPA Roofing & Construction, LLC

## Company Overview
CPA Roofing & Construction, LLC is a licensed roofing and general construction contractor based in Warrenton, Missouri. Founded in 1995, the company serves residential and commercial property owners across central and eastern Missouri within a 50-mile radius of Warrenton. Licensed, insured, and available seven days a week.

## Location
- City: Warrenton, MO 63383
- Service radius: 50 miles
- Counties served: Warren, Lincoln, Montgomery, Gasconade, Franklin, St. Charles (partial)

## Services Offered
1. New Roof Installation — Shingle, metal, and flat roof systems for homes and businesses
2. Roof Repairs — Leak fixes, flashing repair, emergency response
3. Commercial Roofing — Large-scale installations for warehouses, offices, and retail
4. Commercial Roof Repairs — Flat and low-slope business roof maintenance and repair
5. Metal Roofing — Standing seam and corrugated metal, 40–60 year lifespan
6. TPO Roofing — Energy-efficient single-ply membrane systems for commercial flat roofs
7. Roof Coatings — Protective silicone and acrylic coatings that extend roof life 10–15 years
8. Roof Tear-Offs — Complete removal of old roofing before replacement
9. Insurance Roofing Bids — Storm damage inspections, adjuster coordination, claim filing
10. Siding Installation & Repair — Vinyl, fiber cement, and engineered wood siding
11. Roofing Contractor Services — Full-service inspections, maintenance plans, code-compliant work
12. Drywall Installation — New construction, remodels, and storm damage restoration
13. Drywall Repair — Water damage repair, hole patching, texture matching

## Service Areas
Warrenton, Wright City, Wentzville, Troy, Moscow Mills, Jonesburg, Montgomery City, Foristell, Marthasville, New Florence, Hermann, and surrounding communities across Warren County and the I-70 corridor.

## Key Facts
- Founded: 1995
- Years in business: 30+
- Licensed and insured in Missouri
- Available 7 days a week, 7 AM – 7 PM
- Free estimates on every project
- Insurance claim specialists since 1995
- Residential and commercial
